app.name: QingToolbox
app.subtitle: Modular Windows toolbox
home.title: Welcome to QingToolbox
home.subtitle: A modular Windows toolbox where tools are loaded only when needed.
home.systemDescription: The toolbox is ready and all discovered modules remain available on demand.
modules.title: Modules
modules.subtitle: Discover, load and manage toolbox modules.
empty.modules.title: Your toolbox is empty
empty.modules.description: QingToolbox does not preinstall specific tools. Import trusted .qmod modules as you need them.
empty.modules.step.obtain.title: Get a module
empty.modules.step.obtain.description: Download a .qmod from a developer or release page you trust.
empty.modules.step.import.title: Import the module
empty.modules.step.import.description: QingToolbox validates the package structure without loading DLLs during import or refresh.
empty.modules.step.load.title: Load and open
empty.modules.step.load.description: Select the module, load it explicitly, and then open its window.
empty.modules.securityNotice: Only import modules from trusted sources. Once loaded, a module runs with your current user permissions.
empty.home.title: Start building your toolbox
empty.home.description: QingToolbox provides the module host; you install specific tools only when you need them.
empty.running.title: No modules are running
empty.running.description: Modules are not loaded automatically at startup or refresh. Go to Modules to load and open one explicitly.
running.title: Running Modules
running.subtitle: Modules that are currently loaded or active.
settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Configure QingToolbox.
settings.languageDescription: Choose the display language for the toolbox.
module.author: Author
module.noModulesDiscoveredHint: Import a .qmod package or add a development module to the application Modules directory.
workspace.title: Workspace
workspace.subtitle: Open a loaded module to start working.
workspace.emptyTitle: Select a loaded module and click Open.
workspace.emptyDescription: Modules are loaded manually and unloaded when no longer needed.
home.modulesHint: Development and user modules are discovered without loading their assemblies.
localization.resourceCouldNotBeRead: Localization resource could not be read: {0}
status.moduleImported: Module '{0}' imported. It has not been loaded.
status.moduleImportedNextStep: Module '{0}' imported and still unloaded. Select Load when you are ready.
status.userModulesFolderOpenFailed: Failed to open the user module folder: {0}
status.moduleLoadBeforeOpen: Load module '{0}' before opening its view.
status.moduleNoView: Module '{0}' did not provide a view.
moduleHost.subtitle: QingToolbox module
floatingBadge.enableTooltip: Keep QingToolbox available as a desktop floating badge
floatingBadge.restoreFailed: QingToolbox could not switch window modes safely.
startup.launchAtLoginDescription: Start QingToolbox after signing in to Windows
startup.moduleDescription: Automatically load and activate this module when QingToolbox starts.
startup.moduleChanged: Module files changed. Confirm Start with QingToolbox again.
startup.moduleUnavailable: This module payload is unavailable or contains an unsupported link.
startup.presentationSaveFailed: Startup presentation could not be saved; the previous choice was restored.
startup.registrationFailed: Windows login startup could not be updated.
startup.moduleAuthorizationFailed: Could not update this module's startup authorization.
startup.missingClearFailed: Could not clear missing module startup authorizations.
status.startupFailed: QingToolbox could not finish starting. The main window remains available.
notificationArea.unavailable: The notification-area icon is unavailable. The main window was kept open.
closeDialog.title: Close QingToolbox
closeDialog.description: How should QingToolbox run after the main window is closed?
closeDialog.trayDescription: Keep running and reopen QingToolbox from the Windows notification area.
closeDialog.exitDescription: Stop running modules and exit the application completely.
closeBehavior.title: Window behavior
closeBehavior.saveFailed: Window close behavior could not be saved. The main window remains open.
startup.unavailableInSandbox: Windows login startup is unavailable in development and module test environments.
moduleUpdate.completedStale: Update check complete using older cached metadata. {0} update(s) available.
moduleUpdate.resultsOutdated: The module list changed during the check. Run the update check again.
moduleDownload.alreadyVerified: A verified update package already exists.
moduleDownload.metadataChanged: The official update information changed. Review it before downloading again.
moduleDownload.metadataStale: Fresh update information is unavailable. The download was not started.
moduleDownload.sizeMismatch: The downloaded file size does not match the official information.
moduleDownload.hashMismatch: The downloaded file failed its integrity check.
moduleDownload.untrustedRedirect: The download address redirected to an untrusted location.
moduleDownload.sourceUnavailable: The update package is temporarily unavailable.
moduleDownload.storageUnavailable: The verified update package could not be saved.
moduleDownload.disabled: Package downloads are disabled in this environment.
moduleUpdate.sourceUnavailable: The official update source is temporarily unavailable.
moduleUpdate.status.NotOfficial: Not managed by the official source
moduleUpdate.status.NoPublishedRelease: No release is currently published through the official source
moduleUpdate.status.HostUpdateRequired: A newer QingToolbox version is required
moduleUpdate.status.HostVersionIncompati: The available module version does not support this QingToolbox version
moduleUpdate.status.LocalVersionNewer: Local version is newer than the official source
moduleUpdate.status.InvalidLocalVersion: The local module version is invalid
moduleUpdate.status.SourceInvalid: The official update metadata is invalid
moduleUpdate.status.DisabledByEnvironmen: Update checks are disabled in ModuleTest
moduleUpdate.noModules: There are no modules to check for updates.
moduleUpdate.unexpectedFailure: The update check could not be completed.
